title: Kenyan Fish Tacos
description: A fusion of Kenyan and Mexican flavors, this dish combines the juiciness of Kenyan fish with the boldness of Mexican spices.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Season the fish with salt, pepper, and Mexican spices.
Grill the fish for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, mix the chipotle mayonnaise with lime juice in a small bowl.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a grilled fish fillet onto a tortilla, followed by a dollop of chipotle mayonnaise and a sprinkle of cilantro.
